overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman-style action game showing a caped character walking through a rainy, atmospheric urban environment at night. The character approaches and passes a police vehicle with flashing red and blue lights on wet streets lined with historic stone architecture and modern buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic district street with stone pavement

events.description: dark sedan passes by on the right side of the street
character continues walking straight as the police vehicle approaches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet stone street toward the approaching police vehicle with cape flowing behind

notable_agents.action: police SUV approaching with flashing red and blue emergency lights

entered.detail: large gothic stone building with stairs and warm yellow interior lighting
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising in the background
police vehicle with flashing red and blue lights approaching on the wet street
tall street lamp casting bright light through the fog and rain
dark public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The caped character walks down a rain-slicked stone street at night, flanked by a historic stone building on the left. Ahead, a police SUV with flashing emergency lights approaches through the fog. The atmosphere is dark and moody with artificial lighting from street lamps and building windows reflecting off the wet pavement.

events.description: character passes the police vehicle on the left side
ground surface changes from large stone slabs to cobblestone paving

agents.ego_description: walking past the police vehicle and continuing down the cobblestone street into the foggy distance

entered.detail: dark colored sedan parked along the right curb
traffic signal or street sign mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character passes the police vehicle on the left and continues into a cobblestone-paved intersection. The historic building recedes into the background on the left while parked cars line the right side of the street. The police vehicle's flashing lights illuminate the foggy air as the character moves deeper into the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, rain-slicked urban corridor that transitions from a narrow street into an open cobblestone intersection. It begins with a caped character walking past a historic stone building, moving toward a police SUV whose flashing emergency lights pierce through the dense fog. As the character passes the vehicle on the left, the artificial glow of street lamps and building windows reflects off the wet pavement, casting shifting colors across the scene. The environment then expands as the historic architecture recedes, shifting the focus toward a line of parked cars on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the foggy urban landscape as they enter the wide, cobblestone-paved intersection.
